rulings.Case Title: DAVIS VS A.P. GREEN INDUSTRIES, INC.
rulings.Rulings: GRANT. OREGON STATUTES ARE INAPPLICABLE DUE TO CCP 361 EXCEPTION. PLAINTIFF WAS A CALIFORNIA RESIDENT AND HELD THE CAUSE OF ACTION WHEN IT ACCRUED. PLAINTIFFS' CAUSES OF ACTION, HOWEVER, ARE BARRED BY CCP 340, 340.2, & Uram v. Abex Corp., (1990) 217 Cal.App.3d 1425. THE FILING OF A WORKER'S COMPENSATION CLAIM, BY ITSELF, DOES NOT COMMENCE THE RUNNING OF THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS UNDER CCP 340.2. RATHER, THE STATUTE RUNS FROM DISABILITY. HERE, PGS. 22-24 OF PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION DEMONSTRATE THAT PLAINTIFF WAS DISABLED IN 95' AND PLAINTIFFS KNEW THAT. (PB)
